title: Every Day Counts
description: David shares the mindset and daily disciplines that drove him from walk-on hopeful to All-American — and how your team can adopt the same relentless, intentional approach to every single day.

title: Faith, Family, Football
description: A talk about priorities, purpose, and what happens when life forces you to redefine success. Grounding your career and your character in what truly matters.

title: Overcoming Adversity & Leadership
description: From a career-ending injury to building a national media career, David shares the framework for turning setbacks into comebacks — and how real leaders respond when the stakes are highest.

title: Encouraged by Faith
description: A faith-based keynote on finding hope, strength, and purpose through life's hardest seasons. David speaks openly about the role faith has played in every chapter of his story.

title: Winning Mindset
description: The mental frameworks that separate good from great. Lessons drawn from the football field, the broadcast booth, and the moments in between that nobody sees.

title: Custom Topic
description: David works directly with event organizers to craft a message tailored to your audience, your mission, and your moment. Every speech is built for the room it's in.
